name: okf-bundle-smith
description: Create, enrich, validate, repair, and package Open Knowledge Format bundles from web, repository, and enterprise sources.

interface.shortDescription: Build, validate, and package OKF bundles.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for producing Open Knowledge Format bundles with disciplined source research, concept design, frontmatter hygiene, citations, indexes, update logs, validation, graph export, and packaging.
defaultPrompt: Create an OKF bundle from authoritative sources.
Review and repair this OKF bundle.
Update this OKF bundle and add a log entry.
